summary: Tested 2 new features: Parent Portal Language Selection and Educational Games Creator. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed all features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features fully tested and working: 1) Parent Portal Language Selection - teachers can select Spanish, English, French, or Portuguese when generating portal links. Language is stored with token and displayed correctly on HomeschoolPortal page. 2) Educational Games Creator - AI-powered game generation from lesson content works correctly. Games can be saved, listed, and played. Game types include quiz, matching, fill_blanks, true_false, and flashcards.

parent_portal_language_selection.POST /api/students/{id}/homeschool-porta: PASS - accepts es, en, fr, pt
parent_portal_language_selection.GET /api/homeschool-portal/{token}: PASS - returns language stored with token
parent_portal_language_selection.Frontend StudentProgress language dropdo: PASS - shows 4 language options with flags
parent_portal_language_selection.Frontend HomeschoolPortal multi-language: PASS - displays content in selected language (tested English)

educational_games_creator.POST /api/games/generate: PASS - generates quiz game from lesson content using AI
educational_games_creator.Frontend GamesCreator page: PASS - loads with game types, difficulty selector, question count
educational_games_creator.Frontend game generation: PASS - generates game with title, questions, preview/save buttons
educational_games_creator.Frontend My Games tab: PASS - shows saved games with play/share buttons
educational_games_creator.Navigation Games link: PASS - appears in sidebar with NEW badge

api_endpoints_verified: POST /api/students/{student_id}/homeschool-portal-token - language parameter (es, en, fr, pt)
